title: Garden Mile Maple Leaf Screening Panel Fence Privacy Screen for Garden Artificial Trellis Living Wall Panel Topiary Expandable Trellis Privacy Fence Screening 180 x 90cm
features: Specifications – The maple leaf screening panel serves as an ideal privacy screen garden solution. This realistic topiary-style screen clips together easily to provide maximum coverage and privacy. Maintenance free home decor. Realistic UV protected, attached to an expandable willow trellis. Use vertically or horizontally. Dimensions: 180 x 90 cm.

Durable – The privacy fence screening panel is not just functional but also adds an aesthetic element to your outdoor space. This garden fence screening panel is a unique fusion of practicality and style. With heavy duty material this will last many years to come.

Versatile – This trellis with artificial leaves is a stylish alternative to traditional screening, making it an excellent choice as a balcony privacy screen. It is suitable for walls, fences, sheds, and balconies. Easily mounts to any wall or fence to quickly and effectively create coverage.

Indoor and Outdoor – Our maple leaf screening panel doubles as artificial plant wall panels, creating a vibrant green facade. Use it as a garden screen or inside your home to bring a touch of nature indoors. The addition of realistic UV protected maple style leaf over each panel brings subtle colour to any otherwise traditional look.

Privacy Screen - As a fence covering, our product stands out due to its versatility. It works well as an artificial fence screening for garden fence panels, offering an eye-catching alternative to a traditional fence trellis.
